businessDescription: Gas station along the highway selling diesel, unleaded, and premium gasoline.
Gasolinahan sa kanto na nagbebenta ng gasolina at diesel; may maliit na tindahan.
We sell fuel for cars and motorcycles — unleaded, diesel, and LPG.
Petrol station with convenience store and car wash services.
Puno ng gasolina at diesel ang mga sasakyan dito; may pang-refill ng LPG.
Full-service gas station with oil change and tire inflation.
Nagbebenta kami ng gasolina at diesel para sa mga truck at pampublikong sasakyan.
Unleaded and diesel fuel retail; open 24 hours for motorists.
Lending company that offers personal loans and business loans with affordable interest.
Nagpapautang kami ng pera para sa emergency, tuition, o puhunan sa negosyo.
We provide salary loans and multi-purpose loans to employed individuals.
Financing for motorcycle purchase, appliance purchase, and small business capital.
Loan company na tumatanggap ng application para sa personal at business loan.
We offer quick cash loans with minimal requirements and fast approval.
Trucking and hauling services — we deliver goods and materials to construction sites and warehouses.
Nagha-hatid kami ng mga kargamento at raw materials gamit ang truck sa mga factory.
Freight trucking company for bulk delivery of construction materials and agricultural products.
We operate a fleet of trucks for cargo delivery to provinces and cities.
Trucking service para sa paghatid ng hollow blocks, semento, at bakal sa construction.
Hauling of sand, gravel, and building materials to project sites.
Pharmacy selling prescription and over-the-counter medicines, vitamins, and first-aid supplies.
Botika na may licensed pharmacist; nagbebenta ng gamot at medical supplies.
Drugstore with generic and branded medicines; also sells hygiene and baby care products.
We sell medicines, vitamins, and health supplements in our pharmacy.
May botika kami na nag-ooffer ng prescription filling at OTC medicines.
Community pharmacy serving barangay with affordable generic medicines.
Sari-sari store sa tabi ng bahay na nagbebenta ng bigas, noodles, at mga de-lata.
Small neighborhood store selling rice, canned goods, soap, and snacks.
Tindahan sa kanto na nagtitinda ng candies, softdrinks, shampoo sachet, at pang-ulam.
We run a sari-sari store that sells basic groceries and household items by piece or small pack.
Maliit na tindahan na nagbebenta ng tocino, longganisa, itlog, at pang-agahan.
Sari-sari store with load and prepaid cards; sells snacks and drinks.
Restaurant that serves Filipino dishes like adobo, sinigang, and grilled fish.
Karinderia na nagluluto ng ulam at kanin para sa mga workers at estudyante.
We serve rice meals, viands, and merienda in our small eatery.
Eatery near the office selling breakfast silog and lunch turo-turo meals.
May kainan kami na nagse-serve ng Filipino comfort food at daily specials.
Turo-turo restaurant with home-cooked ulam and unlimited rice option.
Warehouse that offers storage space and inventory management for businesses.
Nag-ooffer kami ng storage at pallet handling para sa mga distributors.
We provide cold storage and dry warehouse for food and consumer goods.
Warehouse space for rent with loading dock and forklift service.
Pawnshop that accepts jewelry, gadgets, and appliances as collateral for loans.
Sanglaan na tumatanggap ng alahas at electronics; may monthly interest.
We lend money against gold, watches, and cellphones; redeemable within contract period.
Pawnshop with appraisal service for jewelry and electronic devices.
Rice mill that grinds palay into bigas; we sell wholesale and retail.
Nagga-giling kami ng palay para sa mga farmers; may drying facility din.
We operate a rice and corn mill for local farmers and traders.
Rice milling service — we accept palay and deliver bigas to buyers.
We grow rice, corn, and vegetables on our farm for the local market.
Nagtatanim kami ng palay at gulay sa aming bukid; ibinebenta sa palengke.
Crop farming of rice, corn, and high-value vegetables for market sale.
We lease commercial and residential properties to tenants on monthly or yearly contract.
Nagpa-rent kami ng commercial spaces at offices sa mga negosyante.
Property leasing for retail spaces, offices, and residential units.
We rent out office and retail spaces in our building; flexible terms.
Plant nursery selling ornamental plants, fruit tree seedlings, and garden supplies.
Nursery na nagbebenta ng mga halaman, seedlings, at potting mix.
We sell ornamental plants, succulents, and gardening tools at our nursery.
Coffee shop selling brewed coffee, milk tea, and pastries; WiFi available.
Milk tea and coffee shop near the school; nagbebenta din ng sandwiches.
Cafe with espresso, cold brew, and light meals; good for studying and meetings.
Recruitment agency that deploys workers to local and overseas employers; placement fee applies.
Nagre-recruit kami ng workers para sa factory, construction, at overseas jobs.
We are a licensed recruitment agency for OFW and local placement.
Manpower agency supplying workers to construction, manufacturing, and households.
